title: STEBRUAM 30 Pieces Sanding Sheets 93 x 230mm,400 Grits Hook and Loop Sandpaper,Sanding Pads Assorted Fit Sander for Polishing Rust Removal
features: 【Includes】The sanding sheets Grits 400.Totally 30 sheets size:93 x 230 mm

【Square Sading Paper】The sanding sheets made of high quality alumina granules and high strength resin material can prevent pilling, sandpaper for sander anti-static and anti-blocking,good choice for sanding and polishing.
【Suitable Model】The hook and loop sanding sheets 93 x 230 mm fastening capability of each sheet allows it to be used with mechanical/electrical sanders of any brand

【Features】Each Sander Paper measures have grit mark on the back, the smaller the number, the rougher the polishing effect, the larger the number, the finer the polishing effect; please choose to use according to your needs.
【Widely Used 】The ssanding sheets are widely used to wiping rust on metal surfaces and polishing or grinding nonmetallic objects,such as plastic,wood,rubber,leather,glass,stone and more.
